title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
